subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #008 The Bab
subcodes.first_line: As for the Bab —may my soul be His sacrifice!—it was at a young age
subcodes.first_line_orig: اما حضرت اعلی روحی له الفدآء در سن جوانی یعنی بیست و پنج سال
subcodes.subjects: @events in the life and ministry of the Bab, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @Declaration; advent of the Bab
